subject: Social Sciences
title: Human Rights Quest
tagline: Explore the SA Constitution and Bill of Rights in action!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What document lists South Africans' basic rights?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Bill of Rights is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Bill of Rights.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What international document lists universal rights?
options: The Universal Declaration of Human Rights
stages.correctOption: The Universal Declaration of Human Rights
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Universal Declaration of Human Rights is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Universal Declaration of Human Rights.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What is a human right?
options: A basic freedom every person is entitled to
The Universal Declaration of Human Rights
stages.correctOption: A basic freedom every person is entitled to
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A basic freedom every person is entitled to is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A basic freedom every person is entitled to.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What right protects people from unfair discrimination?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
The Universal Declaration of Human Rights
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The right to equality is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The right to equality.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What right allows people to practise any religion?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
A basic freedom every person is entitled to
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Freedom of religion is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Freedom of religion.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What right protects children specifically in South Africa?
options: A basic freedom every person is entitled to
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Children's rights in the Constitution is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Children's rights in the Constitution.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: Who can approach the courts if their rights are violated?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Any South African citizen is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Any South African citizen.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What body investigates human rights violations in SA?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
stages.correctOption: The South African Human Rights Commission
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The South African Human Rights Commission is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The South African Human Rights Commission.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What day is celebrated as Human Rights Day?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
A basic freedom every person is entitled to
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is 21 March.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: What historic event does Human Rights Day commemorate?
options: The South African Human Rights Commission
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Sharpeville Massacre is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Sharpeville Massacre.
